name: Trueque (Custom System Builder)
description: Adapter for the Trueque RPG running on Custom System Builder. Provides schema fields and creation hints since CSB does not expose schemas via standard Foundry APIs.
author: AI-Game-Master community
creationHints:
Trueque is a horror RPG by Pepe Pedraz.
- Characters are defined by: a concept (concepto), 3 beliefs (creencias), 3 backgrounds (trasfondos), 2 pillars of stability (pilares de estabilidad), and a treasured possession (posesión preciada).
- Characters start with 3 Impetus points (Ímpetu).
- Dice rolls are either Horror rolls or Risk rolls.
- There are multiple settings: Trueque, Mitos, Folk Horror, Vacío, Revoluciones.
- Character sheets are created via Custom System Builder templates.
creationSteps: Define the character concept (concepto) — a short summary of who the character is
Write three beliefs (creencias) that define the character's worldview
Choose three backgrounds (trasfondos) — past experiences that shaped the character
Define two pillars of stability (pilares de estabilidad) — what keeps the character grounded
Optionally write a sad ballad (balada triste)
